title: tectaria palmata var. platanifolia
intro: Tectaria palmata var. platanifolia, also known as the Lady palm, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tectaria palmata var. platanifolia include the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as an antidote for snake bites. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, but more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
